hero.title: Contact Us
hero.subtitle: Have a question, a partnership idea, or want to get involved? We'd love to hear from you.

infoSection.label: Get In Touch
infoSection.title: Reach Out Directly
infoSection.subtitle: Prefer email, a phone call, or social media? Choose whatever works best for you.

formSection.label: Send a Message
formSection.title: Send Us a Message
formSection.subtitle: Fill out the form below and our team will get back to you as soon as possible.
formSection.successMessage: Thank you! Your message has been received — we'll be in touch soon.
formSection.errorMessage: Something went wrong sending your message. Please try again or email us directly.
